records.question: Who lives at 8258 Miles Ford Apt. 857 Bedford MA 01731 US with the prefix Mr. and driver’s license S99929681, and has an encounter coded exactly 185349003?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT patients.patient FROM patients
JOIN conditions ON patients.patient = conditions.patient
JOIN encounters ON conditions.encounter = encounters.id
WHERE encounters.code = 185349003 AND patients.address = '8258 Miles Ford Apt. 857 Bedford MA 01731 US' AND patients.prefix = 'Mr.' AND patients.drivers = 'S99929681'

INNER JOIN encounters e ON p.patient = e.PATIENT
WHERE p.address = '8258 Miles Ford Apt. 857 Bedford MA 01731 US'
AND p.prefix = 'Mr.'
AND p.drivers = 'S99929681'
AND e.CODE = 185349003

    WHERE a.DESCRIPTION = 'House dust mite allergy'
    AND a.CODE >= 232350006
)
AND p.patient IN (
    SELECT o.PATIENT
    FROM observations o
    WHERE o.DESCRIPTION LIKE '%weight%'
    AND o.VALUE = 55.58
    AND o.UNITS = 'kg'
)
AND p.patient IN (

    FROM procedures pr
    JOIN encounters e ON pr.ENCOUNTER = e.ID
    WHERE pr.CODE = 371883000

)

records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.patient
FROM patients p
INNER JOIN allergies a ON p.patient = a.PATIENT
WHERE p.gender = 'F'
AND p.maiden = 'Price'
AND p.marital = 'married'
AND p.passport = 'X11720118X'
AND p.birthplace = 'Becket MA US'
AND p.race = 'black'
AND p.ethnicity = 'Dominican'
AND a.CODE >= 232350006

records.question: Who has the prefix Mr., lives at 5129 Barton Rapids Suite 716 Tyngsborough MA 01879 US, was born on 1991-12-28, and was born in Wareham MA US?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT patients.patient FROM patients
WHERE patients.prefix = 'Mr.' AND patients.address = '5129 Barton Rapids Suite 716 Tyngsborough MA 01879 US' AND patients.birthdate = '1991-12-28' AND patients.birthplace = 'Wareham MA US'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT patients.patient
FROM patients
WHERE patients.prefix = 'Mr.'

  AND patients.birthdate = '1991-12-28'
  AND patients.birthplace = 'Wareham MA US'
